g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why did we choose React.js for the farmer app?')
sendPrompt('How does Tailwind CSS help with the mobile-first farmer UI?')
sendPrompt('Why is face-api.js used in the browser for face scan?')
sendPrompt('What does Axios do in the React frontend?')
sendPrompt('How does JWT work with RS256 for role-based access?')
sendPrompt('How does express-rate-limit protect the login API?')
sendPrompt('Why is Node.js a good choice for this irrigation backend?')
sendPrompt('How is Express.js used to structure the REST API routes?')
sendPrompt('What does the Python Flask ML microservice do?')
sendPrompt('What does scikit-learn do in the irrigation prediction model?')
sendPrompt('What data does OpenWeatherMap provide and which endpoint do we call?')
sendPrompt('How are FAO crop water requirement tables used in the system?')
sendPrompt('What does the OpenCV face recognition API verify?')
sendPrompt('What MongoDB collections store farm and irrigation data?')
sendPrompt('What does Mongoose do as an ODM for MongoDB?')
sendPrompt('What is Redis used to cache in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does dotenv manage in the project?')
